title: geranium bohemicum subsp. lanuginosum
intro: Geranium bohemicum subsp. lanuginosum, commonly known as the woolly cranesbill, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the geranium family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Geranium bohemicum subsp. lanuginosum include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and anxiety, as well as its ability to improve circulation and reduce swelling. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
